description_long: This handbag is a cylindrical woven basket with a slightly tapered base and a wide, open top. The exterior is adorned with intricate geometric patterns in dark brown and beige, featuring repeating diamond and line motifs. The rim is reinforced with a stitched border, and two long, flat straps are attached on opposite sides, likely for carrying over the shoulder or by hand. The straps appear to be made from a similar woven material, with a subtle pattern that complements the main body. The interior is visible and unlined, suggesting a lightweight and breathable construction. The overall appearance is artisanal, with a focus on traditional craftsmanship and decorative patterning.
description: A cylindrical woven handbag with geometric patterns in brown and beige, featuring two long patterned straps and a reinforced rim.
description_view_0: This view shows the side of the handbag with one strap hanging forward, highlighting the detailed geometric pattern and the stitched rim.
description_view_1: The front view displays both straps fully extended and the symmetrical pattern across the main body, emphasizing the open top and wide mouth.
description_view_2: This angle reveals the opposite side of the handbag, with one strap visible and the intricate pattern continuing seamlessly around the body.
description_view_3: This view shows the handbag from a slightly different angle, with both straps visible and the geometric design clearly wrapping around the surface.
attribute_strap_type: Two long, flat, non-adjustable shoulder straps attached at the rim on opposite sides.
attribute_closure_mechanism: None; the handbag has an open top with no visible closure mechanism.
attribute_decorative_elements: None, aside from the woven geometric pattern.
attribute_pattern: Geometric pattern with repeating diamond and line motifs in dark brown and beige.
